CheckTitle: Ensure Microsoft Authenticator number matching is enforced
Description: Verifies that the Microsoft Authenticator push notification configuration requires number matching. Without number matching, MFA fatigue attacks can trick users into approving sign-ins they did not initiate.
Risk: Without number matching, attackers can bombard users with repeated MFA push notifications (MFA fatigue/prompt bombing) until the user accidentally approves. Number matching forces the user to enter a displayed number, preventing blind approval.

Remediation.Recommendation: Enable number matching in the Microsoft Authenticator settings under Authentication Methods policy. This is the default for tenants since May 2023 but may have been overridden.

SourceNotes: Number matching became default for new tenants in May 2023. AI-generated framework mappings.
